english: She who is pure white like jasmine and moon and snow-garland, clad in white raiment
She who holds the veena and the rod of blessing in her hands, seated on a white lotus
roman: Ya Veena Vara Danda Manditakara, Ya Shweta Padmasana

hindi: या ब्रह्माच्युत शंकर प्रभृतिभिः देवैः सदा वन्दिता।
english: She who is always worshipped by Brahma, Achyuta (Vishnu), Shankara (Shiva) and all the gods
roman: Ya Brahmaachyuta Shankara Prabhriti Bhih Devaih Sada Vandita

hindi: सा मां पातु सरस्वती भगवती, निःशेष जाड्यापहा॥
english: May that Goddess Saraswati protect me and remove all my dullness of mind
roman: Sa Maam Paatu Saraswati Bhagwati Nihshesh Jadyaapaha

hindi: शुक्लां ब्रह्मविचार सार परमाम्, आद्यां जगद्व्यापिनीम्।
english: She who is the highest essence of the contemplation of Brahman, the primordial, pervading the universe
roman: Shuklaam Brahma Vichaar Saar Paramaam, Aadyaam Jagad Vyapineem

english: Holding the veena and a book, bestower of fearlessness, dispeller of the darkness of ignorance
roman: Veena Pustak Dharineem Abhayadaam, Jadya Andhkar Apahaam

english: Holding a crystal rosary in her hand, seated on the lotus
roman: Haste Sphatika Maalikaam Vidadhateem, Padmasane Sansthitaam

hindi: वन्दे तां परमेश्वरीं भगवतीम्, बुद्धिप्रदां शारदाम्॥
english: I bow to that Supreme Goddess, the bestower of wisdom, Sharada (Saraswati)
roman: Vande Taam Parmeshwareem Bhagwateem, Buddhipradaam Shaaradaam
